title: Software Update - DFU - Headset low battery: dialog stays when HS is turned off
scenario: Low battery DFU warning dialog persists on screen after headset is turned off, requiring manual dismissal
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset.
3. Ensure the headset battery level is below 5%.
4. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update (or equivalent path that triggers DFU check).
5. Observe that a low battery warning dialog appears: "DFU (firmware update) is not possible due to low battery."
6. While the low battery dialog is still open, press the Power button on the headset to turn it off.
7. Observe the dialog behavior on screen.
8. Reconnect the headset and repeat steps 3-5 to get the low battery dialog again.
9. While the low battery dialog is open, navigate to the Settings page (Device Settings).
10. Press the Power button on the headset to turn it off.
11. Observe the dialog and page behavior.
expected: 1. When the headset is turned off while the low battery dialog is open (from any screen), the dialog should close automatically. 2. When the headset is turned off while on the Settings page with the dialog open, the dialog should close and the user should remain on the Settings page for the disconnected device.
